title: Sterifeed Baby Bottle, Sterile, Reusable 250ml, Pack of 5
features: Hospital grade baby bottles as supplied to the NHS
Individually wrapped, Sterile and Ready to use
Rigid baby bottle prevents force feeding
Airtight and leak proof baby bottle suitable for refrigeration and freezing
Clear baby bottles with high quality print and accurate graduations every 5ml
description: Sterifeed are the No 1 supplier to the NHS for its range of baby bottles, teats, colostrum collectors and baby feeding accessories. Sterifeed reusable baby bottles are individually wrapped, sterile and ready to use. Sterifeed baby bottles are clear and have a high-quality print with calibrated graduations every 5ml. Sterifeed baby bottles are suitable for refrigeration and freezing and are airtight and leak resistant to ensure maximum shelf life for breast milk when stored in the refrigerator or freezer. Sterifeed baby bottles are made from FDA food grade clarified polypropylene. 100% free of Bisphenol–A (BPA) Bisphenol–S (BPS), DEHP, Phthalates. All Sterifeed baby bottles can be recycled.
